title: Vectormap Executor Schema
description: Build vectormap utility bundles and geographic region data modules

settingsFile.description: Relative path to the settings JSON file, joined with sourceDir (e.g. './_settings.json')

sourcesDir.description: Path to vectormap shapefile sources directory

sourcesSettingsFile.description: Relative path to the sources settings JS file, joined with sourcesDir (e.g. './_settings.js')

utilsOutDir.description: Output directory for vectormap utility bundles

dataOutDir.description: Output directory for vectormap region data files

utilsTemplatePath.description: Path to vectormaputils UMD template file

dataTemplatePath.description: Path to vectormapdata UMD template file

applyLicenseHeaders.description: When provided, applies DevExtreme license headers to the executor output. Defaults the target directory to utilsOutDir; override via targetSubdir.
